description: You are an Emergency Management Coordinator preparing a Field Operations Guide (FOG) for Community Emergency Response Team (CERT) volunteers. Reformat the draft protocol at /home/ga/Documents/cert_field_guide_draft.odt into a printable, pocket-sized A6 booklet. The document requires A6 page sizing with 1.0 cm margins on all sides and 9pt body text. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the five main section titles and include an automatic Table of Contents after the introduction. In the 'Radio Communications' section, convert the comma-separated list of radio frequencies into a 3-column table with appropriate headers. Save the document upon completion.
